summary: Core deterministic checks pass after audit repairs.
Sanskrit proper names are protected before pymorphy3 normalization while ordinary Russian verbs still lemmatize.
Shared reversible Windows-safe filename mapping has no illegal stems or collisions in the checked PWG key set.
The full deterministic assembled export completes in one supervised run, validates all 120173 grouped cards, and quarantines lossy records outside the normal stream.
evidence: python src/assemble.py build wrote 120173 assembled grouped cards in 57.8s
assemble.py build supports --offset/--out/--quarantine chunks and fail-closed temp-file install

summary: Review decisions are ingestible, validated, and summarized for reviewers, but the current store has no print-ready human-reviewed rows yet.
evidence: 217 review CSV rows validate with 0 reviewer decisions
0 print-ready because legacy rows still await human decisions

summary: Gold labels now have strict ingest, status, and reviewer-packet tooling, but the real 320-row human-labeled file is still pending.
evidence: python src/gold_validate.py gold/_human_gold_review.csv requires 320 unique labeled items

summary: Agreement reports, deterministic double-review queues, and wide-to-long ingest now exist, but the real stratified double-reviewed sample is still pending.

fixture double-review labels generate human_precision_report.md and double_review_agreement.md
